    def test_close_active_tab_fallback(page: Page):
    
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Step 1: Navigate to login page
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        page.goto("https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login")
    
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Step 2: Login to application
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        page.get_by_role("textbox", name="User ID").fill("CSASINHN")
        page.get_by_role("textbox", name="Password").fill("GOLD950")
        page.get_by_role("button", name="Login").click()
    
        expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(".*"))
    
        create_order_button = (
            page.get_by_role("complementary")
            .get_by_role("button", name="Create Order")
        )
    
        # ==================================================================
        # SCENARIO A: Previous tab fallback
        # ==================================================================
    
        # Create Order A
        create_order_button.click()
        order_a_name = (
            page.get_by_role(
                "button",
                name=re.compile(r"Draft Order #")
            )
            .last
            .text_content()
            .strip()
        )
    
        # Create Order B
        create_order_button.click()

            )
            .last

            .strip()
        )
    
        # Create Order C

        order_c_name = (

                name=re.compile(r"Draft Order #")
            )
            .last
            .text_content()
            .strip()
        )
    
        # Activate Order B
        page.get_by_title(order_b_name).click()
    
        # Close Order B
        order_b_tab = page.get_by_title(order_b_name)
